title: Data for business | Stats NZ
content:
Data can help you start, support, and grow your business. Explore what data is available for you, and how you can use it.
Stats NZ produces a wide range of information that could help your business. Our data can be used to understand customer demographics. It can be used to help understand trends in economic activity in your industry. Exploring international trade data can be a great way of identifying and sizing potential export markets.

## How data could help your business
Business success depends on knowing your customers. We hold information on the demographics of your potential customers – by region, age, sex and household income.
You could use this to:
- improve the products and services you offer
- identify new markets and opportunities for expansion
- improve your marketing and sales efforts.

### Know the business landscape
Stats NZ produces a range of information that can help businesses understand the landscape in which they operate.
Business demography data can be used to identify the number of businesses and the number of employees by a wide range of dimensions. For example:
- Retail trade statistics offer quarterly insights into sales activity by industry and by region.
- Business financial statistics produce quarterly insights into sales, purchases, salaries and wages paid and operating profit every quarter.
- Building consents issued data can be used to understand trends in construction industries.

### Know your benchmarks
Stats NZ produces a range of financial performance / benchmark statistics. These can be used for business planning by:
- setting realistic goals for performance and growth
- comparing your financial performance with other businesses.

## Where to find business data in our data tools
Stats NZ has two main data tools: Aotearoa Data Explorer and Infoshare. The following table shows some of our other data sources and in which tool you will find them.

## Other great sources of information
Visit business.govt.nz

## Contact us for guidance
We're familiar with the many different kinds of data available, and the many different ways business can use it. Chances are, we've talked about it with businesses like yours before.
Contact our Information Centre for advice on what data is available, and how it might be able to help you.
Freephone: 0508 525 525 Email: info@stats.govt.nz
